post.description: Get balance in sats

Cancel a swap (unlock outputs and mark as cancelled).
Only allowed for Pending swaps (before L1 transaction is detected).

Claim a swap (after L1 transaction has required confirmations)
For open swaps, l2_claimer_address is required (the claimer's L2 address)
Connect to a peer
Deposit to address

Create a swap (L2 → L1)
If l2_recipient is None, creates an open swap (anyone can fill it)

parent_chain.description:
Parent chain type for swaps
Note: This can be different from the sidechain's mainchain network.
For example, sidechain may be on Regtest, but swaps can target Signet, Mainnet, etc.

post.description:
Delete a swap from the database.
Only allowed for Pending or Cancelled swaps.

Delete peer from known_peers DB.
Connections to the peer are not terminated.
Format a deposit address
Generate a mnemonic seed phrase
Get the best mainchain block hash known by Coinshift
Get the best sidechain block hash known by Coinshift
Get the block with specified block hash, if it exists
Get mainchain blocks that commit to a specified block hash
Get a new address
Get swap status

oneOf.description: Swap data structure

l1_claimer_address.description:
Address of the person who sent the L1 transaction (the claimer)
Set when L1 transaction is detected

oneOf.description: Sidechain block hash where L1 txid was validated via parent chain RPC

l1_txid_validated_at_height.description: Sidechain block height where L1 txid was validated via parent chain RPC

oneOf.description:
L2 address that the filler (Bob) declared when providing L1 tx details.
For open swaps, the claim is only valid if it pays this address.
L2 address that created the swap (first input of SwapCreate). Used to restrict cancel/delete to creator.
L2 recipient address. None means open swap (anyone can fill)

post.description: List all UTXOs
Attempt to mine a sidechain block
Get OpenAPI schema
Get pending withdrawal bundle

Reconstruct all swaps from the blockchain
This is useful for recovering from database corruption or verifying swap integrity
Returns the number of swaps reconstructed
Remove a tx from the mempool
Set the wallet seed from a mnemonic seed phrase
Get total sidechain wealth
Stop the node
Transfer funds to the specified address

Update swap L1 transaction ID (called when L1 transaction is detected).
For open swaps, pass l2_claimer_address so the claim is only valid for that address.
Initiate a withdrawal to the specified mainchain address
